title: Historical Achievement Sculpture Grid

imagePrompts.prompt: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous human achievements in history: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Interlocking oval shapes, meticulously piled and glued to form a 3D organic puzzle, stacked to create rounded topographical mass::4   Material Physics:  Roasted oily surface, deep dark brown hues, central crack visible in each bean, dry but glossy texture::3   Illumination:  Warm cafe lighting, strong specular highlights bouncing off the oily skins, deep black shadows in the cracks::2   Render Stack:  Culinary macro photography, highly tactile, photorealistic, 8k::1 Negative:deep teal:: -1
